pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Squid Game Guard (Triangle) 1000%
pageContext.description: The haunting and omnipresent Guards from the hit Netflix series Squid Game have made their way to Be@rbrick!   Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Squid Game Guard (Triangle) 1000% Collectible Figure!  Standing approximately 27.5 inches tall, this Be@rbrick features the cryptic Triangle-masked Guard, ready to enforce rules and report to the Front Man of your collection.  Squid Game fans, you surely won't want to miss out on this!
